statement: In every magma, Equation 560 (`x = y * (z * (y * (y * z)))`) implies Equation 1276 (`x = y * (((x * x) * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0753
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op z (op y (op y z))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x x) x) y))
